this_title: The Rebuild: Inside the Montreal Canadiens Season 1
trans_title: 重建之路：蒙特利尔加拿大人 第一季
introduction: The Montreal Canadiens continue to evolve with the sole objective of re-establishing the team as an NHL powerhouse. Up close with players, coaches, executives and die hard Habs fans, The Rebuild: Inside the Montreal Canadiens reveals the 2023-24 behind-the-scenes story of an iconic sports organization undergoing profound change.
chinese_title: 重建之路：蒙特利尔加拿大人 第一季
foreign_title: The Rebuild: Inside the Montreal Canadiens Season 1
